primary_composite.source: PMID:33264825 (Bakris NEJM 2020; NCT02540993 CT.gov resultsSection outcome 1: CV composite HR 0.860, 95% CI 0.747-0.989; stratified Cox model; this is the secondary CV endpoint used as primary for DFS HF subgroup analysis)

acm.source: PMID:33264825 (Bakris NEJM 2020; NCT02540993 CT.gov resultsSection outcome 2: ACM HR 0.895, 95% CI 0.746-1.075; stratified Cox model)

cv_death.source: Derived (assumption: CV death HR approximated at 0.86 matching CV composite; PMID:33198491 (Filippatos Circulation 2021) HF subgroup analysis does not separately report CV death CI; baseline_prop 0.60 typical CV fraction; placeholder for clinician review)

non_cv_death.source: Derived from conservation law: non_cv HR = (ACM_HR - 0.60 x CV_death_HR) / 0.40 approx 0.96; CI approximate; PMID:33198491 does not report non-CV death separately; placeholder for clinician review

delta_k.source: Derived (assumption: finerenone delta-K ~+0.23 mmol/L at lower eGFR (44 mL/min); extrapolated from FIDELIO-DKD overall population; PMID:33264825; NCT02540993 CT.gov does not report continuous delta-K; placeholder for clinician review)

delta_sbp.source: Derived (assumption: ~2 mmHg SBP reduction; PMID:33264825 supplementary; placeholder for clinician review)

delta_egfr.source: Derived (assumption: acute eGFR dip larger at lower baseline eGFR; PMID:33264825; NCT02540993 CT.gov does not report continuous delta-eGFR as safety summary; placeholder for clinician review)
